name: Xtrike Me GM-203 Backlit Optical Gaming Mouse
highlights: The Xtrike Me GM-203 Backlit Optical Gaming Mouse offers a high-profile ergonomic design with full palm and thumb support for comfort during long gaming sessions
Featuring adjustable DPI settings (800-2400) , 6 responsive buttons , and a vibrant 3-color rainbow backlight with a breathing effect, it’s perfect for precision and style
With a 3 million clicks lifespan and a 1
0 cable , this mouse is durable and reliable for all gamers
